reason: InGenius webinar bullet uses content_library.md L176 approved variant 'Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, boosting program engagement and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate' (verbatim). Base resume.json uses a DIFFERENT approved variant ('enhancing program understanding and driving a 78%...'). The substance-floor base-diff flags 'driving/enhancing/understanding' as dropped, but these are the OTHER variant's words; both variants are content_library-sourced and the metric (600+, 78%) is preserved. This was a deliberate Auditor-FIX: removed an unsourced 'developmental programming' relabel and restored the canonical training-webinars phrasing. No thinning, no invention — a sanctioned variant swap per RULE -1 (approved-variant swap allowed).
